name: How long do I have to sue my Houston attorney for using Google AI Overview fake citations that tanked my case?
description: 4 years in TX from malpractice/discovery; act fast with evidence.[2]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to sue my Houston attorney for using Google AI Overview fake citations that tanked my case?

acceptedAnswer.text: 4 years in TX from malpractice/discovery; act fast with evidence.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: In Texas, you generally have 4 years from the malpractice act or discovery of harm to file a legal malpractice suit involving AI errors like fake citations from Google AI Overviews. Courts expect verification, per NY precedents on AI sanctions.[2] Key factors: date of filing error, when you discovered harm, tolling for fraud/concealment. Start clock runs from injury awareness. Gather docket, briefs, AI evidence quickly. Consult TX malpractice specialist before deadline; missing it bars your claim permanently.
